## Benjamin Schatz Named Partner at Foster LLP
by Foster , on News , Press Releases
HOUSTON – January 5, 2023 – Foster LLP, a leading global immigration law firm, today announces that Benjamin Schatz has been named a new partner in Foster’s Houston office. Mr. Schatz primarily represents investors and multinational corporations in their immigrant and nonimmigrant processes. A graduate of the Southern Methodist […]

## Foster LLP Welcomes Elizabeth LaRocca and Dana Delott
by Foster LLP , on Press Releases
Foster LLP, a leading global immigration law firm, is pleased to announce that Elizabeth LaRocca has joined Foster as a Partner in our expanding Dallas office. Dana Delott also has joined our Dallas office as a Senior Attorney. LaRocca and Delott concentrate their practices in business immigration law.  LaRocca has […]

## Sixteen Foster Immigration Attorneys Named to 2023 Best Lawyers in America© List
by Foster LLP , on Press Releases
HOUSTON – Aug. 19, 2022 – Foster LLP, a leading immigration law firm, is pleased to announce that sixteen Foster immigration attorneys have been selected by their peers for inclusion in the 2023 The Best Lawyers in America© list. ## Foster Ranked Top Tier 1 Among 2022 “Best Law Firms” Survey by U.S. News & World Report and Best Lawyers®
by Foster LLP , on Press Releases
HOUSTON – Nov. 5, 2021 – Foster LLP, a leading immigration law firm, has been recognized as a metropolitan Tier 1 firm in the 2022 “Best Law Firms” survey by U.S. News & World Report and Best Lawyers®. Foster received the metropolitan Tier 1 ranking in immigration law for both its Houston and […]
